query:
UPDATE files
            SET name = COALESCE($2, name),
                description = $3,
                size_bytes = $4,
                status = $5,
                purpose = $6,
                expires_at = $7,
                uploaded_by = $8,
                api_key_id = $9,
                source_connection_id = COALESCE($10, source_connection_id),
                source_external_key = COALESCE($11, source_external_key),
                size_finalized = TRUE,
                updated_at = NOW()
            WHERE id = $1
